CCW Chronic Conditions 
• 
Compare the prevalence of the 27 CCW Chronic Conditions to the prevalence of the 30 CCW Chronic Conditions in 
the Medicare fee-for-service (FFS) data 
• 
Identify the impact of the updated condition definitions on the first occurrence dates (also referred to as “ever” 
dates) 
• 
Discuss implications for researchers in terms of switching to the 30 CCW Chronic Conditions file
